```dockerfile
# Fri, 21 Mar 2025 22:11:14 GMT
COPY /rootfs/ / # buildkit
# Fri, 21 Mar 2025 22:11:14 GMT
CMD ["/bin/bash"]
# Fri, 21 Mar 2025 22:11:14 GMT
ARG version=11.0.26.4-1
# Fri, 21 Mar 2025 22:11:14 GMT
# ARGS: version=11.0.26.4-1
